title: Writing — Khó — Lớp 4-5 — Bài 2
subject: tieng-anh
instructions_vi: Bài thi Writing gồm 2 phần. Phần I: Sắp xếp các cụm từ để tạo thành câu hoàn chỉnh và đúng ngữ pháp. Phần II: Viết câu hoàn chỉnh dựa vào các từ gợi ý, không quá 15 từ mỗi câu.

sections.title: I. Rearrange the groups of words in the correct order to make complete sentences.
sections.instruction: Sắp xếp các cụm từ theo đúng thứ tự để tạo thành câu hoàn chỉnh, đúng ngữ pháp.

questions.display_cues: eaten / have you / Japanese food / ever / before /?//

cues_segments.text: eaten / have you / Japanese food / ever / before /?//

explanation.correct_sentence: Have you ever eaten Japanese food before?
explanation.structure_vi: Have + S + ever + V3/ed + O + before?
grammar_notes: ✅ Hỏi trải nghiệm trong quá khứ dùng Hiện tại hoàn thành với 'ever'.

questions.display_cues: to help me / he / with my homework / promised /.//

cues_segments.text: to help me / he / with my homework / promised /.//

explanation.correct_sentence: He promised to help me with my homework.
explanation.structure_vi: S + promised + to-V + sb + with sth
grammar_notes: ✅ Cấu trúc 'promise to do sth' (hứa làm gì).
✅ 'help somebody with something' (giúp ai việc gì).

questions.display_cues: the highest / mountain / Everest / in the world / is /.//

cues_segments.text: the highest / mountain / Everest / in the world / is /.//

explanation.correct_sentence: Everest is the highest mountain in the world.
explanation.structure_vi: S + is + the + tính từ ngắn-est + N + in the world
grammar_notes: ✅ So sánh nhất của tính từ ngắn 'high' là 'the highest'.

questions.display_cues: play marbles / we / we were small / when / used to /.//

cues_segments.text: / we / we were small / when / used to /.//

explanation.correct_sentence: We used to play marbles when we were small.
explanation.structure_vi: S + used to + V + when + S + was/were + adj
grammar_notes: ✅ 'used to + V' chỉ thói quen trong quá khứ nay không còn nữa.

sections.title: II. Write complete sentences with the given cues. You must write NO MORE THAN fifteen words for each sentence.
sections.instruction: Viết câu hoàn chỉnh và đúng ngữ pháp dựa vào các từ gợi ý. Mỗi câu không được vượt quá 15 từ.

questions.display_cues: she / ask / me / what time / train / leave /.//

cues_segments.text: she / ask / me / what time / train / leave /.//

accepted_answers: She asked me what time the train would leave.
She asked me what time the train left.

explanation.correct_sentence: She asked me what time the train would leave.
explanation.structure_vi: S + asked + O + từ để hỏi + S2 + V(lùi thì)
grammar_notes: ✅ Câu tường thuật dạng câu hỏi: lùi thì (sẽ rời đi -> would leave, hoặc left).

questions.display_cues: it / take / him / twenty minutes / walk / school /.//

cues_segments.text: it / take / him / twenty minutes / walk / school /.//

accepted_answers: It takes him twenty minutes to walk to school.
It took him twenty minutes to walk to school.

explanation.correct_sentence: It takes him twenty minutes to walk to school.
grammar_notes: ✅ Cấu trúc chỉ thời gian tiêu tốn để làm việc gì: 'It takes/took + O + thời gian + to-V'.

questions.display_cues: you / should / stop / eat / too much / fast food /.//

cues_segments.text: you / should / stop / eat / too much / fast food /.//

accepted_answers: You should stop eating too much fast food.

explanation.correct_sentence: You should stop eating too much fast food.
grammar_notes: ✅ 'stop + V-ing': Dừng hẳn việc gì đó (dừng việc ăn thức ăn nhanh).
